description: Graphics, tile, sprite, and palette conversion rules.

notes: Real pc080sn glyph/tile mapping remains to be defined.
Do not use SGDK font substitution as a final path.

rules.target: Genesis CRAM palette packing and palette-line assignment
notes: Genesis supports a 512-color master space but only 64 resident CRAM entries at once.
Treat Rastan palette work as palette-bank translation, not graphics-ROM conversion.
Use actor/video attribute paths such as a4+0x27 as palette-bank leads until final arcade palette RAM writes are proven.
Real palette source words now look 0x0RGB-based and are converted through 0x59ad4 into 16-color blocks in the 0x200000 shadow region.
Final rule must document how arcade layer/object palette banks map onto Genesis PAL0..PAL3.
